description: Add Chief of Staff ambiguous ownership regression scenario
hypothesis: A fourth operations scenario improves domain-learning coverage for owner ambiguity and overloaded decision paths.

description: Add PowerPoint investor demo regression scenario
hypothesis: Presentation agents should learn from persuasion-oriented demo decks, not only board/training decks.
A rewrite scenario improves the writing agent's ability to learn from weak source material, not only draft from clean briefs.

description: Add App Builder config-editor regression scenario
hypothesis: A schema editing scenario improves app-building lessons around validation, preview, and save gates.

description: Add Research non-US labs regression scenario
hypothesis: A regional landscape scenario improves research-agent coverage for non-US labs and startup tracking.

description: Add Code Review dependency-drift regression scenario
hypothesis: A dependency drift scenario helps the review agent learn API/version risk patterns beyond local code diffs.

description: Add Data Analysis anomaly-check regression scenario
hypothesis: An anomaly scenario improves data-agent learning for outlier handling and follow-up caveats.
Explicit acceptance criteria make scenario artifacts easier to evaluate and improve across repeated runs.

description: Score permission invariants in every scenario artifact
hypothesis: Permission invariants make sandbox safety measurable across all domain-learning runs.

description: Use DOE to select reflection prompts as a default artifact factor
hypothesis: A 2^3 DOE should show whether acceptance criteria, permission invariants, and reflection prompts independently improve agent-learning artifacts.
